paragraphs: Good momentum — overdue count is down to 24. Well below the 7-day average of 52 — the team is making real progress. Credit to Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) — cleared all overdue.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 19 days past due with 13 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **12 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $15,001 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 31 days past due with 5 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **11 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** Down to 2 overdue — making progress. Keep pushing to close them out today. **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** Down to 2 overdue — making progress. Keep pushing to close them out today.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $16,529 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Angel Pacheco:** Down to 4 overdue — making progress.

143 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **70 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 6 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$60,290 in payments going out this week** across 22 tasks — make sure funds are available. $2,274 expected in from 1 client payment. Heavy week ahead for Kyle Aubry - Project 01 and Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 4. Keep the momentum going.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** Down to 2 overdue — good. Close them out today. **6 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 19 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** Down to 2 overdue — good. Close them out today. 2 upcoming unassigned. 12 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 24 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 4 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 1. Keep the momentum going.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 5 overdue (oldest: 31d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **11 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 20 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 10. Keep the momentum going.

**Ginger Brown:** 13 overdue (oldest: 19d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **12 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 20 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** **16 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 26 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Clean — 2 tasks in progress. **16 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 20 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
